buggy_code:
plt.plot(x, y, label='Training loss')
plt.plot(x, val_y, label='Validation loss')
plt.show()
task: Plot two lines and display a legend
error_location: line 3: plt.legend() not called before plt.show()
clarification_query: What function renders the legend on the plot?
corrected_code:
plt.plot(x, y, label='Training loss')
plt.plot(x, val_y, label='Validation loss')
plt.legend()
plt.show()
explanation: Labels passed to plot() are not displayed unless plt.legend() is called.
